overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Far Cry 6) showing exploration of a tropical Caribbean town. The player character moves from a covered workshop area out into sunlit streets, passing vintage cars and colorful colonial buildings while approaching a large plume of orange smoke in the distance.

stacks of black vehicle tires piled against the wall
red wooden workbench with tools and a desk lamp
white wall with large colorful green and yellow graffiti mural
gray metal electrical boxes with cables mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered workshop area with a corrugated metal roof. The camera moves forward past tool cabinets and stacks of tires toward a red workbench. Colorful graffiti covers the right wall while electrical panels line the left, with sunlight streaming through gaps in the roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical town street with colorful residential buildings

events.description: exits covered workshop into bright sunlight and open street
vintage blue and white sedan drives past from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking out of the workshop and proceeding along the sidewalk into the street

notable_agents.action: vintage blue sedan driving down the street past the camera

entered.detail: small shed with rusted metal roof adjacent to the workshop exit
two-story building with green facade and wooden balcony
weathered red building with boarded windows
large column of orange-yellow smoke rising in the distance
cracked asphalt street with tire marks

overhead electrical wires crossing between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the workshop into a bright sunlit street lined with colorful Caribbean-style buildings. A vintage blue car drives past as the camera continues forward. In the distance, a large plume of orange smoke rises above the rooftops, visible against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with colonial architecture and tree cover

events.description: camera turns slightly right to follow the street curvature

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the street toward the orange smoke plume

notable_agents.action: person in green shirt walking along the sidewalk

blue street sign mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the residential street, passing under tree cover and alongside colorful colonial buildings. The orange smoke plume grows larger on the left side as the camera approaches. A pedestrian in green walks on the distant sidewalk, and power lines crisscross overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with mechanic repairing vintage convertible

entered.detail: two-story colonial building with wooden balcony and stone steps
tall street light pole with horizontal arm

building with turquoise facade and white trim
weathered pink and brown building front with wooden doors

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a street corner where a mechanic is kneeling beside a vintage dark green convertible. The orange smoke plume is now very close on the left. The camera passes the mechanic and continues past colonial buildings with wooden balconies, with the sun creating lens flares as the view opens up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim interior of a cluttered workshop out into a vibrant, sun-drenched Caribbean street. It begins by moving past tool cabinets and stacks of tires under a corrugated metal roof, where sunlight streams through gaps in the ceiling to illuminate graffiti-covered walls. As the camera emerges from the workshop, the environment opens into a bright residential area lined with colorful colonial buildings, while a vintage blue car drives past and a distant plume of orange smoke appears against the blue sky. The scene then progresses down the street under a canopy of trees and crisscrossing power lines, with the orange smoke growing larger and more imposing on the left. Finally, the camera passes a mechanic kneeling beside a dark green convertible at a street corner, moving past wooden balconies as the sun creates lens flares in the open air.
